name: Exa Search
description: AI-native web search and semantic retrieval

setupSteps.title: Sign up at exa.ai
setupSteps.instructions: Free tier includes ~1000 searches/month. Paid tiers for more volume.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.instructions: On the API Keys page, click Generate new key. Give it any name.

setupSteps.title: Paste below + Save
setupSteps.instructions: Copy the key and paste below.
